assertions.assertion: Response mentions a migration analysis tool or controller (MigrationAnalysisController) that can be added to the existing IS4 project
assertions.rationale: Does not mention any specific migration analysis tool or MigrationAnalysisController. Suggests general manual analysis approaches instead.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool inspects the running IdentityServer4 instance to provide recommendations
assertions.rationale: No tool mentioned; suggests manual code review and documentation reading instead.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool checks client counts (interactive vs non-interactive) which helps determine the Duende license edition needed
assertions.rationale: Mentions reviewing client definitions but not in the context of a tool checking interactive vs non-interactive counts for licensing.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool checks data protection configuration (application discriminator and/or key repository)
assertions.rationale: Does not mention data protection checks at all.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions that the tool checks authentication schemes for compatibility
assertions.rationale: Mentions third-party integrations needing updates but not in the context of a tool checking authentication schemes.
